OnlinePlayer.title: OnlinePlayer
OnlinePlayer.description: Represents a player in an online room.

id.description: The unique ID of the player.

score.description: The current score of the player.

currentMissionIndex.description: The index of the player's current mission.

progressPercent.description: The overall progress percentage of the player.

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the player completed the race, if finished.

totalTime.description: Total elapsed time in seconds to complete the race.

isHost.description: Whether the player is the host of the room.

hostId.description: The ID of the player hosting the room.

difficulty.description: The difficulty level of the room.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the room was created.

countdownStartTime.description: The timestamp when the countdown phase started.

gameStartTime.description: The timestamp when the play phase started.

missionNames.description: The array of 20 randomly selected mission names.

players.description: Map of player IDs to player states.

rooms/{roomId}.description: Multiplayer game sessions matched by a 4-digit room code.
